calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Janet Brayer, Esq. for Plaintiff: James Fiorucci, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Radley Driah as follows:
Damages $3,548.00
Prejudgment Interest $827.68
Costs $565.00, for a total of $4,940.68
Judgment signed in open court.
